allow: PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/report?address=742+Evergreen+Terrace+Springfield+IL&fetch=1" -UseBasicParsing; $html = $r.Content; if \($html -match 'Demographics'\) { Write-Host "FOUND: Demographics heading" } else { Write-Host "NOT FOUND: Demographics" }; if \($html -match 'Median Age'\) { Write-Host "FOUND: Median Age" } else { Write-Host "NOT FOUND: Median Age" }; if \($html -match 'prem-demo'\) { Write-Host "FOUND: prem-demo class" }; $html | Select-String -Pattern 'Demographics|Median Age|prem-demo|prem-age-row|Household Income|Education' | Select-Object -First 10)

PowerShell($fbiKey = \(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Borde\\livably\\.env" | Where-Object { $_ -match "^FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=" }\) -replace "FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=",""; Write-Host "Key: $\($fbiKey.Substring\(0,8\)\)..."; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/sapi/api/estimates/states/IL/2019/2019?api_key=$fbiKey" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Body: $\($r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(300, $r.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($fbiKey = \(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Borde\\livably\\.env" | Where-Object { $_ -match "^FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=" }\) -replace "FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=",""; $urls = @\("https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/sapi/api/summarized/agencies/IL/Springfield/offenses/2022/2022?api_key=$fbiKey", "https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/sapi/api/agencies/byStateAbbr/IL?api_key=$fbiKey", "https://cde.ucr.cjis.gov/LATEST/webapp/#/pages/home"\); foreach \($url in $urls[0..1]\) { Write-Host "Testing: $\($url.Split\('?'\)[0]\)"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "  Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "  Body: $\($r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $r.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "  Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Write-Host "" })

PowerShell($fbiKey = \(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Borde\\livably\\.env" | Where-Object { $_ -match "^FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=" }\) -replace "FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=",""; $urls = @\("https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/cde/arrest/state/IL/all?from=2019&to=2019&API_KEY=$fbiKey", "https://cde.ucr.cjis.gov/LATEST/webapp/public/api/UCR/estimates/national/2019/2019?api_key=$fbiKey", "https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/sapi/api/participation/local?api_key=$fbiKey"\); foreach \($url in $urls\) { Write-Host "Testing: $\($url.Split\('?'\)[0]\)"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "  Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "  Body: $\($r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $r.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "  Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Write-Host "" })

PowerShell($fbiKey = \(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Borde\\livably\\.env" | Where-Object { $_ -match "^FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=" }\) -replace "FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=",""; $urls = @\("https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/cde/agency/IL0840200?API_KEY=$fbiKey", "https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/cde/geo/states/crime?state=IL&API_KEY=$fbiKey", "https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/cde/ucr/states/offenses/IL/all/2022?API_KEY=$fbiKey", "https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/cde/ucr/cius/agencies/IL/Springfield/offenses/2022?API_KEY=$fbiKey"\); foreach \($url in $urls\) { Write-Host "Testing: $\($url.Split\('?'\)[0]\)"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Host "  Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "  Body: $\($r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $r.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "  Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Write-Host "" })

PowerShell($fbiKey = \(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Borde\\livably\\.env" | Where-Object { $_ -match "^FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=" }\) -replace "FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=",""; $urls = @\("https://crime-data-api.fr.cloud.gov/api/summarized/agencies/IL/Springfield/offenses/2020/2022?api_key=$fbiKey", "https://crime-data-api.fr.cloud.gov/api/agencies/list?api_key=$fbiKey", "https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/sapi/api/summarized/agencies/IL/Springfield/offenses/2020/2022?api_key=$fbiKey"\); foreach \($url in $urls\) { Write-Host "Testing: $\($url.Split\('?'\)[0]\)"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "  Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "  Body: $\($r.Content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(250,$r.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "  Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Write-Host "" })

PowerShell($fbiKey = \(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Borde\\livably\\.env" | Where-Object { $_ -match "^FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=" }\) -replace "FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=",""; $urls = @\("https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/cde/nibrs/assault/count/agency/IL0840200?from=2021&to=2022&API_KEY=$fbiKey", "https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/cde/nibrs/homicide/count/agency/IL0840200?from=2021&to=2022&API_KEY=$fbiKey", "https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/cde/nibrs/burglary/count/agency/IL0840200?from=2021&to=2022&API_KEY=$fbiKey", "https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/cde/agency/byStateAbbr/IL?county=SANGAMON&API_KEY=$fbiKey"\); foreach \($url in $urls\) { Write-Host "Testing: $\($url.Split\('?'\)[0]\)"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Host "  200 OK - Body: $\($r.Content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(200,$r.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "  $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Write-Host "" })

PowerShell($fbiKey = \(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Borde\\livably\\.env" | Where-Object { $_ -match "^FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=" }\) -replace "FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=",""; $urls = @\("https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/cde/geo/states/IL/offenses?from=2021&to=2022&API_KEY=$fbiKey", "https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/cde/police-employment/states/IL?from=2021&to=2022&API_KEY=$fbiKey", "https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/cde/ucr/IL0840200/offenses?API_KEY=$fbiKey", "https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/cde/county/SANGAMON/IL/offenses?API_KEY=$fbiKey"\); foreach \($url in $urls\) { Write-Host "Testing: $\($url.Split\('?'\)[0]\)"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Host "  200 - Body: $\($r.Content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(150,$r.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "  $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($fbiKey = \(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Borde\\livably\\.env" | Where-Object { $_ -match "^FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=" }\) -replace "FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=",""; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://cde.ucr.cjis.gov/LATEST/webapp/public/api/UCR/VictimsOffenses/2022?national=true&API_KEY=$fbiKey" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Host "200 - $\($r.Content.Substring\(0,200\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "$\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://cde.ucr.cjis.gov/LATEST/webapp/public/api/agencies/byStateAbbr/IL?API_KEY=$fbiKey" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Host "200 - $\($r2.Content.Substring\(0,200\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "$\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($fbiKey = \(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Borde\\livably\\.env" | Where-Object { $_ -match "^FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=" }\) -replace "FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=",""; $paths = @\("nibrs","offenses","offense","crimes","crime","incidents","incident","ucr","cius","estimates","summarized","data","violent","property"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { $url = "https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/cde/$p/?API_KEY=$fbiKey"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "200 /$p/ - $\($r.Content.Substring\(0,100\)\)" } catch { $code = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.Value__; if \($code -ne 404\) { Write-Host "$code /$p/" } } })

PowerShell($fbiKey = \(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Borde\\livably\\.env" | Where-Object { $_ -match "^FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=" }\) -replace "FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=",""; $url = "https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/cde/ucr/states?API_KEY=$fbiKey"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -Headers @{"X-Api-Key"=$fbiKey}; Write-Host "200: $\($r.Content.Substring\(0,300\)\)" } catch { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; if \($resp\) { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Host "Error $\($resp.StatusCode\): $\($reader.ReadToEnd\(\).Substring\(0,300\)\)" } else { Write-Host $_.Exception.Message } })

PowerShell($fbiKey = \(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Borde\\livably\\.env" | Where-Object { $_ -match "^FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=" }\) -replace "FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=",""; $url = "https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/cde/ucr/states?API_KEY=$fbiKey"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -Headers @{"X-Api-Key"=$fbiKey}; Write-Host "200: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; if \($resp\) { $stream = $resp.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $body = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); Write-Host "Error $\($resp.StatusCode.Value__\): $body" } else { Write-Host $_.Exception.Message } })

PowerShell($urls = @\("https://crime-data-api.fr.cloud.gov/swagger.json", "https://crime-data-api.fr.cloud.gov/api/swagger.json", "https://crime-data-api.fr.cloud.gov/spec"\); foreach \($url in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Host "200 $url"; Write-Host $r.Content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(500,$r.Content.Length\)\) } catch { Write-Host "FAIL $url - $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($fbiKey = \(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Borde\\livably\\.env" | Where-Object { $_ -match "^FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=" }\) -replace "FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=",""; $urls = @\("https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/sapi/summarized/agency/IL0840200/aggravated-assault?api_key=$fbiKey", "https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/sapi/agencies/count/IL0840200/offenses?api_key=$fbiKey", "https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/sapi/estimates/states/IL?api_key=$fbiKey", "https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/cde/estimates/national?API_KEY=$fbiKey", "https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/cde/summarized/agency/IL0840200/aggravated-assault?API_KEY=$fbiKey"\); foreach \($url in $urls\) { Write-Host "Testing: $\($url.Split\('?'\)[0]\)"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Host "  200: $\($r.Content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(200,$r.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "  $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Write-Host "" })

PowerShell($fbiKey = \(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Borde\\livably\\.env" | Where-Object { $_ -match "^FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=" }\) -replace "FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=",""; $urls = @\("https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/sapi/agencies/count/IL0840200/offenses?since=2016&until=2022&api_key=$fbiKey", "https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/sapi/agencies/count/states/IL/offenses?since=2019&until=2022&api_key=$fbiKey", "https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/sapi/offenses/count/states/IL/count?since=2019&until=2022&api_key=$fbiKey"\); foreach \($url in $urls\) { Write-Host "Test: $\($url.Split\('?'\)[0]\)"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Host "  200: $\($r.Content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(300,$r.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "  $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($fbiKey = \(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Borde\\livably\\.env" | Where-Object { $_ -match "^FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=" }\) -replace "FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=",""; $offenses = @\("all-offenses","aggravated-assault","homicide","burglary","larceny","robbery","rape","arson","motor-vehicle-theft","violent-crime","property-crime"\); foreach \($off in $offenses\) { $url = "https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/cde/summarized/agency/IL0840200/$off`?since=2016&until=2022&API_KEY=$fbiKey"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 6; Write-Host "200 $off - $\($r.Content.Substring\(0,100\)\)" } catch { $code = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.Value__; Write-Host "$code $off" } })

PowerShell($fbiKey = \(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Borde\\livably\\.env" | Where-Object { $_ -match "^FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=" }\) -replace "FBI_CRIME_API_KEY=",""; $urls = @\("https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/cde/summarized/agency/NY0303001/aggravated-assault?since=2015&until=2022&API_KEY=$fbiKey", "https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/cde/summarized/agency/NY0303001/aggravated-assault?API_KEY=$fbiKey", "https://api.usa.gov/crime/fbi/cde/summarized/agency/IL1016200/aggravated-assault?API_KEY=$fbiKey"\); foreach \($url in $urls\) { $path = \($url -split "\\?"\)[0]; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Host "200 $path $\($r.Content.Substring\(0,200\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "$\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.Value__\) $path" } })

PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/report?address=742+Evergreen+Terrace+Springfield+IL" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; if \($html -match 'Crime'\) { Write-Host "FOUND: Crime section" } else { Write-Host "NOT FOUND" }; \($html | Select-String -Pattern 'Safety Score|per 100k|State Average|FBI Uniform|prem-crime|prem-grade'\).Matches.Value | Select-Object -First 8)

PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/report?address=742+Evergreen+Terrace+Springfield+IL&fetch=1" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; if \($html -match 'prem-crime'\) { Write-Host "FOUND: prem-crime" } else { Write-Host "NOT FOUND: prem-crime" }; if \($html -match 'Safety Score'\) { Write-Host "FOUND: Safety Score" }; if \($html -match 'Crime'\) { Write-Host "FOUND: Crime text" }; Write-Host "HTML length: $\($html.Length\)")

PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/report?address=742+Evergreen+Terrace+Springfield+IL&fetch=1" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $html | Select-String -Pattern 'Safety Score|IL State Average|per 100k|national|FBI Uniform|grade-circle' | Select-Object -First 10 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Trim\(\) })
